title: End-like Floating Islands
description: Creates floating islands in overworld and the nether, with a main island in the center and many smaller islands surrounded at a distance.
body:
A minecraft datapack that creates floating islands in overworld and the nether, a.k.a a main island in the center and many smaller islands surrounded at a distance.

## Features
- Terrain noise in `the nether` is similar to `the end`, but sightly changed
  - Nether terrain surface is sightly rougher than `the end`
  - [1.18 and later] Overworld terrain noise has completely rewroted to match 1.18 world height
  - [Prior to 1.18] Overworld terrain noise is overriden with terrain noise in the end
- End gateways are distributed randomly in `overworld` and `the nether`, targeting (0,0)
  - Below are the biomes that end gateways may generate:
    - deep_ocean
    - desert
    - forest
    - windswept_hills(used to be minecraft:mountains in 1.18-)
    - ocean
    - plains
    - savanna
    - swamp
    - taiga
    - basalt_deltas
    - nether_wastes
    - soul_sand_valley
    - **warped_forest**(*heighest density*)
    - end_highlands(*vanilla datapack*)

## Usage

Load it with correct version of Minecraft(Java Edition) before world generation, and enjoy the game `:)`

## Special Thanks

- U_ruby - for coming up with the initial idea of this datapack
